url: https://clawx.com.cn

# Open Source AI Research Assistant

Open Source AI Research Assistant

Open Source AI Research Assistant

Your AI Researcher, 24/7 Online
-------------------------------

ClawX is an AI assistant running on your own computer, with the full capabilities of the OpenClaw ecosystem built in. It can autonomously complete tasks and deliver the results through your preferred messaging tools.

Always on, never stops

Not a cloud-based "chat window", but a real AI research assistant that works 24/7 on your computer.

Give it an old computer, and it becomes your always-online personal analyst.

Designed for data-driven professionals

Desktop App for AI Power Users, Ready to Use
--------------------------------------------

Five core capabilities, supporting multiple scenarios

![Cross-Source Scraping, Nothing Missed preview](data:image/png;base64,)

Real-time data collection, multi-source aggregation

### Cross-Source Scraping, Nothing Missed

ClawX runs independent browser instances that can simultaneously log in and browse multiple professional data sources — financial terminals, news sites, policy platforms, and social media. Optimized for different markets and languages.

* Autonomously browses and extracts web content, converting it into structured summaries
* Multi-engine search + full-page web scraping
* Independent browser sessions, directly operate your data terminal accounts

Use Case

Every morning, ClawX scans communities, search results, and niche sites to surface new opportunities in one briefing.

![Cron Scheduling, Data Comes to You preview](data:image/png;base64,)

Scheduled tasks, 24-hour non-stop monitoring

### Cron Scheduling, Data Comes to You

Set monitoring frequency: every 5 minutes, every hour, or at fixed daily times. ClawX executes automatically on schedule. No cron expressions needed — visual scheduler, pick time, pick task, save and go.

* Periodically scrape specific pages/data sources and track changes
* Monitor key metrics, policy releases, and announcement updates
* Instant push notifications through messaging channels when anomalies are detected

Use Case

Monitor the pages and keywords you care about every 15 minutes, and push only meaningful changes to your Telegram or email.

![WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / Feishu / Email preview](data:image/png;base64,)

Omnichannel delivery, information waits for no one

### WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / Feishu / Email

Researchers can't stare at screens all day. ClawX supports 20+ messaging channels, delivering analysis results, monitoring alerts, and research summaries directly to your phone.

* Anomaly alerts sent to Telegram
* Daily research summaries sent to email
* Team-shared data pushed to Feishu/Discord channels

Use Case

Even when you're away from your desk, AI watches in the background and sends important updates to your phone and team channels within seconds.

![Not Just a Crawler, an Analyst That Thinks preview](data:image/png;base64,)

AI-native analysis, beyond data transfer

### Not Just a Crawler, an Analyst That Thinks

ClawX has a built-in AI Agent runtime with multi-step reasoning. It doesn't just show you web pages — it understands, summarizes, compares, and judges. Supports 10+ AI Providers including OpenAI / Anthropic / Google / OpenRouter / Moonshot / Qwen.

* Cross-reference multiple reports, extract core opinion divergences
* Auto-summarize long texts/PDFs, distill conclusions in one sentence
* Track time-series data changes, flag anomalies
* Unified processing across multilingual sources

Use Case

Drop in 3 long PDFs or docs, and ClawX compares them in parallel to highlight consensus, disagreements, and missing assumptions.

![Runs Locally, Compliance Worry-Free preview](data:image/png;base64,)

Data stays on your computer

### Runs Locally, Compliance Worry-Free

For finance professionals, data security isn't optional. ClawX runs entirely on your own device — not a cloud service that might shut down anytime. Your computer is on, it's on.

* All data stored locally, never passes through third-party servers
* API Keys encrypted at rest
* Open source, fully auditable

Use Case

Keep sensitive files on your own machine, with local storage, encrypted keys, and open-source code your team can audit anytime.

More than a research tool — it's a complete AI operating system

Open Source Power — 55+ Skills Out of the Box
---------------------------------------------

ClawX is fully compatible with the OpenClaw ecosystem, covering productivity, dev tools, multimedia creation, smart home, and more

### Productivity

Notion, Obsidian, Trello, Apple Notes/Reminders — AI manages your knowledge and tasks

### Developer Tools

GitHub ops, code assistant, terminal management — the developer's AI partner

### Media Creation

AI image generation, video processing, speech-to-text — supercharge content creation

### Smart Home

Lights, speakers, Spotify — control your home with voice or messages

### Communication

Discord, Slack, iMessage, voice calls — omnichannel AI assistant

### MCP Protocol

Compatible with Model Context Protocol, connect any MCP tool service

### ClawHub Market

Community-driven skill marketplace, one-click install, continuously expanding

Fully compatible with OpenClaw ecosystem Cross-platform macOS / Windows / Linux Supports CLI + GUI dual mode

Get Started in 3 Minutes
------------------------

No coding required, one-click setup with visual interface

01

### Download & Install

Choose your platform (macOS / Windows / Linux), double-click to install, follow the setup wizard.

02

### Configure Your AI

Select an AI provider, enter your API Key. Visual interface, no command line needed. Highly recommend Claude, Gemini, or OpenAI flagship models.

03

### Start Working

Give instructions through chat, or set up scheduled tasks for AI to execute automatically.

#### Pro tip

Install ClawX on a spare old computer, give it the right permissions, and it becomes your 24/7 personal research assistant. More permissions, more power. As long as it's powered on, the AI never stops.

Ready to bring your AI researcher online?
